name: Divider
description: A simple divider component for visually separating content with horizontal or vertical orientation.
usage_guidelines: Use to separate sections of content.
Use horizontal orientation for vertical layouts.
Use vertical orientation for horizontal layouts.
Provides semantic separator role for accessibility.

styling_info.visual_description: A thin line (1px) in gray color. Horizontal dividers span full width with vertical margins. Vertical dividers span full height with horizontal margins.

Horizontal.title: Horizontal

Vertical.title: Vertical
